chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA Nos. 13 to 17 of 2013 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________  For hearing of main case 18.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for applicants These reference applications are pending since 2013 without any progress. Today Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate has appeared without file or instructions and merely seeks time. These reference applications are pending for almost 12 years and it appears that the Commissioner Inland Revenue, Hyderabad is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is directed to place copy in each connected file. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
